Items.Text: • A special celebration event has arrived to thank everyone!

Items.Title: Claim Your Reward
Items.Description: "Talk to the NPC near the leaderboards. Event lasts for 2 weeks!"

Items.Text: 🎁 10K CELEBRATION REWARDS:
• Unlocks Exclusive [10k Visits] Nametag (Limited-Time!)
• +10 Marshmallow Bees
• +2 Star Egg Fragment #1
• 12-Hour Free Boost (x2 Egg Multiplier!)
• New Interactive Playerlist: Press [TAB] or click the top button to smoothly slide open the brand-new leaderboard!
• Dynamic Player Plates: Spot your friends instantly in Gold, Premium members in Purple, and Developers in a custom animated UI!
• Advanced Social Dropdown: Click any player to open the new extras menu. Includes satisfying hover animations and quick access to Profiles and Avatars.
• Live Stat Tracking: Keep an eye on the competition with real-time updates for Eggs, Clicks, and formatted Playtime metrics.

Items.Description: "Wow! It looks clean!"

Items.Text: • Cooldown: 30:00 >> 15:00 (Faster Play!)
• Boost Duration: 4:30 >> 5:00
• Old Buffs: x3, x5, x10, x25, x50, x100
• New Buffs: x1.5, x2, x2.5, x3, x3.5, x5, x10
• Removed: x1000 Egg Boost (Too OP!)
• Global Boost: x2 Bunny Shop EXP is now LIVE!
• The Easter Event is entering its final stage—get your rewards before it ends!

Items.Title: Easter Final Farewell
Items.Description: "The festivities are leaving soon!"

Items.Title: World 3 Part 2: Coming Soon..
Items.Description: "The Spirit Era is coming to an end. Get ready for what's next!"

Items.Text: 🌳 HOW TO GET THE TREE EGG

Items.Title: Tree Egg Quest
Items.Description: "A mysterious sprout hidden behind a puzzle."

Items.Text: • Step 1: Talk to Contest Bear to start the secret quest.
• Step 2: Find and count all 65 trees around the map.
• Step 3: Type the secret code 0975 (65 trees x 15) into the door. (Same Panel as Cloud Egg)
• Step 4: Equip your new Tree Nametag to solve the puzzle.
• Step 5: Find TV in the Event World and follow it's instructions!
• Step 6: Head down into the newly opened sewer in the Event World and grab your egg!
• Notes: The Electric Panels are in World 3 and in the Pumpkin Egg Room!
🌌 HOW TO GET THE GALAXY EGG

Items.Title: Space Egg (Galaxy Egg)
Items.Description: "Lost somewhere out in space."

Items.Text: • Step 1: Complete all 15 Contest Bear quests to unlock the shop.
• Step 2: Buy the new Apollo Command Helmet.
• Step 3: Blast off into space!
• Step 4: Search around space to find the hidden Galaxy Egg.
🚀 EVENT EXCLUSIVE GEAR
• Apollo Command Helmet: 'A relic from the Sea of Tranquility. One small click for a farmer, one giant leap for your collection!'
• Perks: 4x Eggs per click & 5% Seed Discount!
• Price: 280SX Eggs
• Materials Requirements: 619x Strawberry | 619x Blueberry | 456x Sunflower | 31x Marshmallow Bee | 7x Star Egg Fragment #1
🐝 THE FINAL SHOWDOWN: BBM

Items.Title: Final Quest.
Items.Description: "Bumble Bee Man has arrived as the ultimate challenge. Track down and collect all 11 event eggs to qualify for his grueling final challenge loop!"

Items.Text: • 🏆 Grand Finale Completion Rewards:
• +1 Free Egg Level permanently added to your stats!
• Massive x5 Egg Boost completely active for 1 Whole Day (24 Hours)!
• 🔮 Completing this finale locks in early priority access to insanely overpowered upcoming rewards for the Skill Tree Update dropping in the near future!
• Old Buffs: x1.5, x2, x2.5, x3, x4, x5
• New Buffs: x3, x5, x10, x25, x50, x100
• Secret Buff: x1000 Egg Boost (1 in 100,000)

Sections.SectionTitle: 🥚 Event Egg Spawn Rate & Haste Mechanic

Items.Text: • We've completely rebalanced the event egg spawn configurations to make hunting smoother, fairer, and reward active streak tracking!
• 📈 Dynamic Egg Spawn Adjustments
• Common Egg: 45% >> 51%
• Uncommon Egg: 39% >> 30.5% (Reduced clutter)
• Rare Egg: 14% >> 16%
• Legendary Egg: 2% >> 2.5%
• Tribe Egg (Secret): Base roll chance heavily cut down from 1 in 2500 >> 1 in 1800 per spawn cycle!
• ⚡ New Event Mechanic: Haste Stacking
• Collecting rare event eggs now grants stacks of Haste, speeding up spawn intervals and scaling up your server luck dynamically!
• Legendary Eggs: Grant x1 Haste Stack on collection.
• Tribe Eggs: Grant a massive x5 Haste Stacks instantly on collection.
• 💡 How Haste Works (For This Event Only)
• Spawn Acceleration: Each stack cuts down your egg cooldown timer from the base rate down toward the boosted limit (0.4s >> 0.2s). Maximum speed is reached at 10 Haste stacks!

• Luck Multiplication: Active haste progressively multiplies your underlying tier generation weights. It increases the chance of Uncommon, Rare, and Legendary eggs appearing, while safely scaling the Tribe Egg rate up to 200% spawn chance!!
• The Bunny Merchant has received a massive balance pass! Prices, stock rates, free rewards, and mastery tiers have all been adjusted.
• 😎 Free Item Shop Adjustments
• Free Seeds Minimum: 1 >> 2 (Guaranteed double seeds!)
• Free Fruits Maximum: 5 Max >> 3 Max (Slightly nerfed)
• Marshmallow Bee Drop Rate: 1% >> 2.5% Chance
• Free Eggs Value: Buffed by x2!
• 💰 Paid Item Shop Adjustments
• Fruit Item Prices: Cut by 20% cheaper!
• Ingredients (Extracts/Oils/Enzymes): Cut by 35% cheaper!
• Star Egg Fragment #1: Price cut by 33.3% | Spawn Rate: 0.5% >> 2%
• Marshmallow Bee: Price cut by 50% | Spawn Rate: 2.1% >> 7.3% | Stock: Guaranteed 2-3 stock per spawn!
• Merchant EXP: All non-fruit purchases now grant x5 Base EXP!
• 📈 Progression Tier Changes (Before vs. After)
• Discount Perk Shift: Discount slots now unlock early at Level 1 (2%) instead of waiting until Level 8!
• Lv. 0 Base EXP Gain: +25 >> +30 EXP/Item
• Lv. 2 Base EXP Gain: +35 >> +45 EXP/Item
• Lv. 4 Base EXP Gain: +50 >> +65 EXP/Item
• Lv. 5 Base EXP Gain: +60 >> +85 EXP/Item
• Lv. 6 Base EXP Gain: +85 >> +105 EXP/Item
• Lv. 7 Base EXP Gain: +100 >> +125 EXP/Item
• Lv. 8 Base EXP Gain: +120 >> +135 EXP/Item
• Lv. 11 Required EXP Nerf: 54,842 >> 52,746 EXP
• Lv. 12 Required EXP Nerf: 73,541 >> 70,541 EXP
• Lv. 13 Required EXP Nerf: 89,653 >> 84,653 EXP | Base EXP Gain: +300 ➔ +350
• Lv. 14 Required EXP Nerf: 110,444 >> 100,444 EXP | Base EXP Gain: +450 ➔ +480
🍯 MARSHMALLOW BEE CHANGES
• Marshmallow Bees are now much easier to get! You can find them from:
• Spring Eggs: 2.5% chance to drop.
• Legendary Eggs: 5% chance to drop when collected in the Event World.
• Contest Bear: Guaranteed reward from Quests 11-15.
• Blackhole Obby: Drops when you win! Easy Mode (25% chance) | Hard Mode (75% chance).
🐻 CONTEST BEAR NERFS
• Quests 1-10 are now much easier to complete so newer players can catch up faster!
😉 EASY MODE CHANGES
• Fixed and nerfed some annoying jumps to make the obby easier overall.
• Slowed down the spinning lasers so they are easier to dodge.
😈 HARD MODE CHANGES
• Removed a lot of lasers to make the path less cluttered.
• Added a few new shortcuts for speedrunners!
• New Update log lol.
• Update log has been moved to Extras tab in Settings GUI.
• The Long Awaited Inventory GUI is here!
• Unlocks the nametag through Quests and Achievements! (More Will Be Available in Near Future!)

Changelog.Description: "You can now View Your Active Boosts!"

Changelog.Text: 📈 Bunny Progression Shop Rewards
• Lv. 0 🟫 Dirt Digging (100 EXP) | +25 EXP/Item | Free Gift Slot #1 (24h) | 1 Shop Slot
• Lv. 1 ⚙️ Iron Root (250 EXP) | Faster Free Gift (20h)
• Lv. 2 🧱 Copper Leaf (600 EXP) | +35 EXP/Item | +1 Shop Slot | Faster Free Gift (18h)
• Lv. 3 🥉 Bronze Berry (1,200 EXP) | 2.5h Shop Refresh | Faster Free Gift (15h)
• Lv. 4 🥈 Silver Sack (2,456 EXP) | +50 EXP/Item | 12h Free Gift | x1.2 Free Item EXP
• Lv. 5 🥇 Golden Guard (4,600 EXP) | +60 EXP/Item | +1 Shop Slot | 10h Free Gift
• Lv. 6 💿 Platinum Petal (10,000 EXP) | +85 EXP/Item | 2h Shop Refresh | 8h Free Gift
• Lv. 7 🟢 Emerald Vine (15,000 EXP) | +100 EXP/Item | +1 Shop Slot | Hidden Stocks I (5% No-Consume)
• Lv. 8 🔵 Sapphire Seed (22,002 EXP) | +120 EXP/Item | Unlocks Discount Slot (5% Max) | 6h Free Gift
• Lv. 9 🔴 Ruby Rose (28,012 EXP) | 1.5h Shop Refresh | 8% Max Discount | 4h Free Gift
• Lv. 10 🔍 Diamond Hunter (37,541 EXP) | Keep the Changes I (5% Refund) | +1 Shop Slot | 12% Max Discount
• Lv. 11 🍀 Crystal Clover (54,842 EXP) | +220 EXP/Item | 2 Free Gift Slots | 3h Free Gift
• Lv. 12 🟠 Amber Antler (73,541 EXP) | +250 EXP/Item | +1 Shop Slot (MAX) | 18% Max Disc | x3 Free EXP
• Lv. 13 ✨ Star Spirit (89,653 EXP) | +300 EXP/Item | 1h Shop Refresh | 22% Max Discount
• Lv. 14 🏆 Elite Merchant (110,444 EXP) | 3h Free Gift | 25% Max Discount | x5 Free Item EXP
• Lv. 15 👑 GRANDMASTER | +1000 EXP/Item | Keep the Changes II (10% Refund) | Hidden Stocks II (15% No-Consume) | 40% Max Discount | x10 Free Item EXP
💡 Mechanics Explained
• Hidden Stocks: A chance that an item won't be removed from the shop after purchase, letting you buy it again!
• Keep the Changes: Your Bunny friend has a chance to return a percentage of the currency you spent.
• Free Multiplier: Higher tiers drastically boost the EXP earned from claiming your daily freebies.
📢 Notice
• More adjustments to the game performance! (it should feel smoother to play the game now!)
• Brand new updates and changes are coming your way soon!
